title: Senior Doctor - Stryker India South Asia Partners - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Stryker India South Asia Partners - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Stryker India South Asia Partners in Varanasi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Stryker India South Asia Partners:
Stryker India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Stryker India South Asia Partners!
